summary: Heartbeat Agent — the continuity and validation arm of VEKIL-KAAN. Runs SENSE→STORE→VERIFY→PULSE cycle every 15 seconds. Does NOT take actions in the world — ensures every action is valid, recorded, and consistent with the law registry. Constructs from BootContext with memory substrate, event store, audit log, law registry, and law enforcer. Manages PULSE_R reception from Reactive agent (thread-safe via lock). Enters BROTHERHOOD_MOURNING if PULSE_R missing >60s. Supports background thread operation. Uses PlanVerifier and StateVerifier for law compliance checks. Writes BOOT, PULSE_H, PULSE_R, TOOL_RESULT, and FLAG events to store.
